name: Rolling Mill Stand 2 Drive Motor
description: Main drive motor for finishing stand 2. AI4I rotational speed, torque, process temperature, and tool-wear signals are mapped to motor load, current, vibration, and thermal stress.

name: Blast Furnace Cooling Pump P-7
description: Cooling water circulation pump for tuyere cooling loop. AI4I power-failure and heat-dissipation signatures are mapped to pump flow, pressure, vibration, and temperature risk.

name: Raw Material Conveyor Gearbox
description: Gearbox for conveyor C-13 feeding sinter raw material bins. AI4I tool-wear and overstrain failure modes are mapped to gearbox oil particles, vibration, and wear progression.
